heading: Assessments
label: 1725 Assessments
text: Beginning eighteen months after , to encourage proper royalty payment the Secretary or the delegated State shall impose assessments on a person who chronically submits erroneous reports under this chapter. Assessments under this chapter may only be issued as provided for in this section.August 13, 1996
notes: Codification, which directed the addition of this section at the end of the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982, was executed by adding this section at the end of title I of that Act to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 104–185, § 4(a)

Effective DateSection applicable with respect to production of oil and gas after the first day of the month following , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1996 Amendment note under .Aug. 13, 1996section 11 of Pub. L. 104–185section 1701 of this title

ApplicabilitySection not applicable to any privately owned minerals or with respect to Indian lands, see sections 9 and 10 of , set out as an Applicability of 1996 Amendment note under .Pub. L. 104–185section 1701 of this title
